title: AL's Piglins Revamped x Fresh Animations
description: A pack that makes AL's Piglins Revamped compatible with Fresh Animations by Fresh_LX!
body:
![Piglins Revamped logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6de22e7055af824e768eb0463cffd337f3c1074.png)

# 

This pack makes AL's Piglins Revamped compatible with Fresh Animations by Fresh_LX!

 

Since AL's Piglins Revamped uses a custom model for it's Piglins and Hoglins, on it's own, it is incompatible with Fresh Animations.

This addon pack fixes that with new models that use the appropriate animations!

 

Important:

In order for this pack to work, you need to load it above FA.

 

Load them in order:

-This Pack

-Fresh Animations
